title: Little Singham Mahabali
desc: Little Singham lands in ancient Mirchigadh to face off against a zombie king and his undead army in order to claim the title of Ultimate Warrior and save the city.

title: Little Singham Bandarpur Mein Hu Ha Hu
desc: Little Singham and his team have to find a way to rescue Chikki from the magical land of Bandarpur. However, they are met with many obstacles on their journey.
